name: VX-702
description: VX-702 is a small molecule investigational oral anti-cytokine therapy for treatment of inflammatory diseases, specifically rheumatoid arthritis (RA). It acts as a p38 MAP kinase inhibitor. In the future, VX-702 may be investigated for combination with methotrexate, a commonly used therapy for RA.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in coronary artery disease, inflammatory disorders (unspecified), and rheumatoid arthritis.
toxicity: good tolerability with three months of treatment,
mechanismOfAction: This p38 MAP kinase inhibitor effectively inhibits LPS-stimulated TNF|[alpha]|, IL-6 and IL-1|[beta]| production.
pharmacodynamics: VX-703 is an anti-cytokine therapy in which p38 MAP kinase inhibitor effectively inhibits LPS-stimulated TNF|[alpha]|, IL-6 and IL-1|[beta]| production.
